task_completion.description: Verify that the sales data is loaded and the two required DAX measures are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data pane on the right shows the loaded table (e.g., 'sales_data') and includes 'Avg_Order_Value' and 'Total_Transactions' with calculator icons indicating they are measures.

task_completion.description: Verify the first page is correctly named.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom of the Power BI canvas is renamed to 'Pipeline Summary'.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 1 contains the required Funnel and Stacked Bar charts with correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Funnel chart is visible showing 4 product categories (Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture). A Stacked Bar Chart is visible showing 2 customer types (New, Returning) on the axis, segmented by 3 payment methods (Bank Transfer, Cash, Credit Card) in the legend.

task_completion.description: Verify the second page is named correctly and configured for drill-through.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom is named 'Category Drillthrough'. In the Visualizations pane, the 'Drill-through' fields well contains the 'Product_Category' field.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 contains the required Card and Table visuals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Card visual displays the Avg_Order_Value (should show approximately 5.02K or 5019 if unfiltered). A Table visual is present containing columns for Sale_Date, Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, and Discount.

task_completion.description: Verify the report is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI application title bar reads 'Sales_Funnel_Report - Power BI Desktop' or a Save As dialog is visible saving the file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Sales_Funnel_Report.pbix'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to build the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Power BI Desktop interface being actively used (menus, drag-and-drop, DAX formula bar), rather than just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the visuals are generated from the actual dataset and not mocked with static shapes or text boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals display the specific data categories from the dataset (e.g., Clothing, Electronics, New, Returning) and standard Power BI tooltips/highlighting behaviors are visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just copy a pre-made .pbix file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must show the step-by-step creation of the visuals, measures, and page renaming, rather than just opening an already completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 1000 records. Product categories are: Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture. Customer types are: New, Returning. Payment methods are: Bank Transfer, Cash, Credit Card. The overall average Sales_Amount is approximately $5,019.27, which should be reflected in the Avg_Order_Value card visual if no filters are applied. Required measures are Avg_Order_Value and Total_Transactions. Required visuals are Funnel, Stacked Bar Chart, Table, and Card.
